  "sinks": "The only sink involving untrusted data is the token generated by 'uid-safe' upon successful verification, which is returned in the resolved promise.",
  "flows": "Input 'captcha' and 'response' are verified through several functions; if all checks pass, 'uid-safe' generates a token which is returned in the success result.",
  "anomalies": "No hardcoded credentials, backdoors, or unusual code patterns are present. The code performs standard validation and token generation without suspicious side effects. Usage of 'uid-safe' for token generation is typical.",
  "analysis": "The code performs validation of CAPTCHA response via multiple functions: verifySolution checks numerical proximity; verifyHorizontalMotion ensures the slider doesn't jump; verifyVerticalMotion ensures movement; verifyTrailLength checks trail data length consistency. The main function 'verifyCaptcha' combines these checks and, upon success, generates a random token using 'uid-safe'. All operations are standard and intended for CAPTCHA verification. No malicious or suspicious behaviors are detected. There are no signs of data leakage, malicious data exfiltration, or backdoors.",
